title: Content Click Recovery System — First Non-Brand Click Attack
current_status: OFF_TRACK — 0 non-brand content clicks on 530 impressions
daily_process: find real pages (blogs, decisions, guides, calculators) with impressions and 0 clicks
improve: snippet alignment, above-fold answer, CTA, internal links

priority_targets.reason_no_click: snippet may give away answer, no CTA urgency
priority_targets.action: check snippet, add curiosity hook, improve CTA above fold

priority_targets.reason_no_click: very low volume — query is niche or position is for rare query
priority_targets.action: expand query coverage, check if position 4 is real
verify SERP visibility for actual queries
check if other geo pages have similar pattern

correction_rules.if_impressions_but_no_click_after_14_day: rewrite title/meta, improve above-fold answer, add stronger CTA
correction_rules.if_position_improves_but_no_click: snippet is giving away answer — add curiosity hook
correction_rules.if_impressions_decline: check indexing status, check for competitor ranking changes
